variables.label: Treatment Emergent Analysis Flag
variables.derivation_notes: Y if AE start date >= first dose date (ASTDT >= TRTSDT), derived from comparison of AE onset and treatment start dates

variables.label: Planned Treatment (N)
variables.derivation_notes: Numeric treatment code from ADSL.TRT01PN, populated at AE onset time

variables.label: Analysis Start Relative Day
variables.derivation_notes: AE start date minus treatment start date plus 1

variables.label: Analysis End Relative Day
variables.derivation_notes: AE end date minus treatment start date plus 1

variables.label: Analysis Severity/Intensity
variables.derivation_notes: Maximum severity across all records for the same AE
